Localization.Description: Attempt to change or delete station components

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Administrator {subject.account.name} deleted the components of station {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to change the components of station {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to delete the components of a station
Administrator {subject.account.name} changed the components of station {event_src.host}
